bird.name: Southern hill myna
bird.summary: The southern hill myna (Gracula indica) is a member of the starling family. It is a resident of the forested regions of south India and Sri…

locations.id: loc-熱帶和亞熱帶旱生闊葉林-dbaa79b4
locations.name: 熱帶和亞熱帶旱生闊葉林
locations.summary: 热带及亚热带旱生阔叶林（英語：tropical and subtropical dry broadleaf forests），简称旱生林（dry forest）是一种WWF定义的栖地生境并用来命名以此为代表的生物群系。其所需的气候类型较常…

relations.subject: Southern hill myna
relations.object_id: loc-熱帶和亞熱帶旱生闊葉林-dbaa79b4
relations.object: 熱帶和亞熱帶旱生闊葉林
relations.evidence: It inhabits tropical and subtropical dry broadleaf forests, mountains, mangrove forests and plantation areas. It is usually found high in the canopy, moving in large noisy groups of about half a dozen, in treetops at the edge of the forest
